articles.title: Semiconductor news feed ready for hourly updates
articles.summary: The scheduled workflow will refresh this saved data file every hour from curated RSS feeds covering chips, foundries, AI hardware, memory, supply chain, and policy.

articles.title: Foundry and manufacturing tracking enabled
articles.summary: Sources include semiconductor engineering and hardware publications for foundry, fab, lithography, wafer, and advanced packaging coverage.

articles.title: AI hardware and datacenter silicon tracking enabled
articles.summary: The dashboard filters for AI chip, GPU, HBM, datacenter, and accelerator terms to surface semiconductor stories tied to AI infrastructure.

articles.title: Policy and supply chain tracking enabled
articles.summary: The updater watches for export controls, trade policy, subsidies, supply chain shifts, and regional technology market news.
